name: My Farm Love Farm
original_name: ฟาร์มเอ๋ยฟาร์มรัก
overview: Wit is a young handsome heir to a real estate empire. His father orders him to go buy a farm owned by Por Liang In, if he can’t make the deal happen, he will be cut off from the family’s fortune. It’s not an easy task for Wit when Por Liang In’s beautiful granddaughter Mintra is there to obstruct his every move.

trailers.title: OST.ฟาร์มเอ๋ยฟาร์มรัก - ผ่านมาจะไม่ผ่านไป [FULL SONG]
